chapter_title.en: Chapter on Zihar (declaring one's Wife Unlawful Like a mother)

text: 4844 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ يَقَعُ ظِهَارٌ عَنْ طَلاَقٍ وَ لاَ طَلاَقٌ عَنْ ظِهَارٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4844 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Ẓihar (a form of divorce by comparison) does not count as a divorce, nor does divorce count as ẓihar."
